$comment: Common branding framework for ALL Jarvis intelligence products (Cyber Brief, Cyber Opportunities, Energy Intelligence, and future products). Ensures a consistent premium visual style across every brief and every output format (HTML/PDF/email/cover image). Report templates and the AI cover-image prompt read these tokens so a single change here re-skins every product. No secrets — pure presentation (Configuration over hard coding, Separation of concerns).

coverImage.styleDirectives: Premium editorial intelligence-report cover. Sophisticated, corporate, modern. Deep navy (#0A1A2F) background with refined gold (#C9A24B) accents. Abstract, professional, NON-literal data-visualisation motifs (network lines, subtle geometric grids, light bokeh). Absolutely NO readable text, NO logos, NO watermarks, NO people's faces. Cinematic, restrained, high-end consultancy aesthetic suitable as a report banner.
coverImage.negativeDirectives: no text, no words, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no charts with numbers, no clipart, no cartoon, no low quality

footer.disclaimer: Produced automatically from open sources by Jarvis Intelligence. Verify critical findings against primary sources before acting. This is an automated analytical product, not professional advice.
